category_sources: Official Truffle docs describe it as a development environment, testing framework, and asset pipeline for EVM blockchains.
source_facts.description describes a development environment, testing framework, and asset pipeline for Ethereum.
display_name_sources: Official Truffle Suite docs use the display name Truffle.
docs_sources: Official archived Truffle Suite documentation provides the Truffle overview and usage documentation.
repo_sources: Official GitHub repository for trufflesuite/truffle redirects to ConsenSys-archive/truffle and is marked as the archived Truffle repository.
tags_sources: Official Truffle docs list smart contract compilation, deployment, debugging, testing, migrations, network management, and NPM package management.
source_facts.description names Ethereum development, testing framework, and asset pipeline.
